name: ai-translate
title: AI Translate
description: Fast screenshot OCR translation for text that cannot be selected, powered by BYOK AI providers.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Translate selected text or type text to translate. Switch models, prompt profiles, and styles on the fly.

commands.name: translate-paste
commands.title: Translate Selection & Paste
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Translate the selected text with your default provider and paste the result in place — no window.

commands.name: rewrite-coach
commands.title: Rewrite & Coach
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Rewrite selected text into natural, idiomatic English, learn why it sounds more natural, and hear it spoken aloud.

commands.name: rewrite-replace
commands.title: Rewrite & Replace
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Rewrite the selected text into natural English with your default provider and paste it in place — no window.

commands.name: screenshot-translate
commands.title: Screenshot Translate
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Capture a screen region, OCR the text, review it, and translate with multiple providers. Switch models to compare.

commands.name: screenshot-ocr-copy
commands.title: Screenshot OCR Copy
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Capture a screen region, OCR the text, and copy it to the clipboard.

commands.name: screenshot-ocr
commands.title: Screenshot OCR
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Capture a screen region and extract text with OCR. Review, copy, or send to translate.

commands.name: history
commands.title: History
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Browse recent translations and rewrites you copied or pasted. Replay copy, paste, or read aloud.

commands.name: translation-settings
commands.title: Translation Settings
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Configure model tier, prompt profile, translation style, and custom instructions.

preferences.title: Default Provider
preferences.name: defaultProvider
preferences.description: Provider shown first and used when no provider checkbox is enabled.

preferences.title: Target Language
preferences.name: targetLanguage
preferences.description: Auto translates Chinese text to English and other text to Simplified Chinese.

preferences.title: Translation Style
preferences.name: translationStyle
preferences.description: Controls how literal or polished the sentence translation should be.

preferences.title: Prompt Profile
preferences.name: promptProfile
preferences.description: Built-in prompt frame appended to every translation request.

preferences.title: Custom Prompt Instructions
preferences.name: customPromptInstructions
preferences.description: Optional prompt instructions sent with every translation, for terminology, audience, tone, or formatting preferences.

preferences.title: OCR Engine
preferences.name: ocrEngine
preferences.description: Engine used by Screenshot Translate.

preferences.title: OCR Text Layout
preferences.name: ocrTextLayout
preferences.description: Formatted preserves OCR line breaks; compact collapses whitespace into one line.

preferences.name: autoCopyOcr
preferences.label: Auto-copy recognized text
preferences.title: Auto-Copy OCR Result
preferences.description: Copy the recognized text to the clipboard automatically after a successful capture.

preferences.title: Fallback OCR
preferences.name: ocrFallbackToLocal
preferences.label: Fallback to local OCR
preferences.description: If an API OCR engine fails, OCR the same screenshot with local macOS Vision.

preferences.title: OCR Timeout Seconds
preferences.name: ocrTimeoutSeconds
preferences.description: Timeout for API OCR requests.

preferences.title: Tesseract Path
preferences.name: tesseractPath
preferences.description: Path or command name for Tesseract. Install with `brew install tesseract` if needed.

preferences.title: Tesseract Languages
preferences.name: tesseractLanguages
preferences.description: Tesseract language list, for example eng, chi_sim, or eng+chi_sim.

preferences.title: Baidu OCR API Key
preferences.name: baiduOcrAPIKey
preferences.description: Baidu AI Open Platform OCR API Key.

preferences.title: Baidu OCR Secret Key
preferences.name: baiduOcrSecretKey
preferences.description: Baidu AI Open Platform OCR Secret Key.

preferences.title: Baidu OCR Endpoint
preferences.name: baiduOcrEndpoint
preferences.description: Baidu OCR endpoint. General is faster; accurate is better for complex screenshots.

preferences.title: Baidu OCR Language
preferences.name: baiduOcrLanguageType
preferences.description: Language hint for Baidu OCR. Auto Detect only works with accurate_basic.

preferences.title: Baidu OCR Paragraphs
preferences.name: baiduOcrParagraph
preferences.label: Auto paragraph detection
preferences.description: Group OCR lines into paragraphs (Baidu paragraph=true).

preferences.title: Provider Switches
preferences.name: enableDeepSeek
preferences.label: DeepSeek
preferences.description: Show DeepSeek translation result.

preferences.name: enableMiMo
preferences.label: Xiaomi MiMo
preferences.description: Show Xiaomi MiMo translation result.

preferences.name: enableGemini
preferences.label: Gemini
preferences.description: Show Gemini translation result.

preferences.name: enableKimi
preferences.label: Kimi
preferences.description: Show Kimi translation result.

preferences.name: enableOpenAI
preferences.label: OpenAI / ChatGPT
preferences.description: Show OpenAI translation result.

preferences.title: Provider Order
preferences.name: providerOrder
preferences.description: Comma separated provider ids: deepseek,mimo,gemini,kimi,openai.

preferences.title: Request Timeout Seconds
preferences.name: requestTimeoutSeconds
preferences.description: Per-provider request timeout.

preferences.title: Max Output Tokens
preferences.name: maxOutputTokens
preferences.description: Maximum generated tokens for chat-compatible providers.

preferences.title: DeepSeek API Key
preferences.name: deepseekAPIKey
preferences.description: Your DeepSeek API key.

preferences.title: DeepSeek Base URL
preferences.name: deepseekBaseURL
preferences.description: Anthropic-compatible DeepSeek base URL.

preferences.title: DeepSeek Model
preferences.name: deepseekModel
preferences.description: DeepSeek model name. Current options are deepseek-v4-flash (Fast) and deepseek-v4-pro (Pro). Thinking mode is disabled per request so translations stay low-latency and honor temperature.

preferences.title: Xiaomi MiMo API Key
preferences.name: mimoAPIKey
preferences.description: Your Xiaomi MiMo API key.

preferences.title: Xiaomi MiMo Base URL
preferences.name: mimoBaseURL
preferences.description: Anthropic-compatible Xiaomi MiMo base URL. Use https://token-plan-cn.xiaomimimo.com/anthropic for Token Plan.

preferences.title: Xiaomi MiMo Model
preferences.name: mimoModel
preferences.description: Xiaomi MiMo model name. Text options include mimo-v2.5-pro, mimo-v2.5, mimo-v2-pro, mimo-v2-flash, and mimo-v2-omni.

preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.name: geminiAPIKey
preferences.description: Your Gemini API key.

preferences.title: Gemini Base URL
preferences.name: geminiBaseURL
preferences.description: Gemini API version base URL.

preferences.title: Gemini Model
preferences.name: geminiModel
preferences.description: Gemini model name. Stable options include gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.1-flash-lite, gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-2.5-pro; preview options include gemini-3.1-pro-preview and gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.

preferences.title: Gemini OCR Model
preferences.name: geminiOcrModel
preferences.description: Multimodal Gemini model used when OCR Engine is Google Gemini. Leave blank to reuse the Gemini Model above.

preferences.title: Read Aloud Voice
preferences.name: geminiTTSVoice
preferences.description: Gemini voice used for Read Aloud (text-to-speech).

preferences.title: DashScope API Key
preferences.name: dashscopeApiKey
preferences.description: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio / DashScope API key for Qwen-TTS. You can also set DASHSCOPE_API_KEY.

preferences.title: Qwen-TTS Base URL
preferences.name: qwenTTSBaseURL
preferences.description: DashScope API base URL. Use https://dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com/api/v1 for the international region if needed.

preferences.title: Qwen-TTS Model
preferences.name: qwenTTSModel
preferences.description: Qwen-TTS model for Read Aloud. Instructions are sent only with Qwen3 TTS Instruct Flash.

preferences.title: Qwen-TTS Voice
preferences.name: qwenTTSVoice
preferences.description: Voice used by Qwen-TTS Read Aloud. The four listed voices are multilingual across all 11 supported languages.

preferences.title: Qwen-TTS Language
preferences.name: qwenTTSLanguageType
preferences.description: Sent as language_type. Auto is useful for mixed or uncertain text; a fixed language usually improves quality.

preferences.title: Qwen-TTS Instructions
preferences.name: qwenTTSInstructions
preferences.description: Optional speaking style instructions. Sent only when Qwen-TTS Model is Qwen3 TTS Instruct Flash.

preferences.title: Kimi API Key
preferences.name: kimiAPIKey
preferences.description: Your Kimi/Moonshot API key.

preferences.title: Kimi Base URL
preferences.name: kimiBaseURL
preferences.description: Kimi Anthropic-compatible coding entrypoint. Requests are sent to /v1/messages (a trailing /v1 is also tolerated). Switch to https://api.moonshot.ai/v1 (or https://api.moonshot.cn/v1) and an OpenAI-compatible protocol to use Moonshot pay-as-you-go.

preferences.title: Kimi Model
preferences.name: kimiModel
preferences.description: Kimi Code model name. kimi-for-coding is the Kimi Code Plan alias to the current K2 model. To call Moonshot pay-as-you-go directly, switch the base URL and use moonshot-v1-8k, moonshot-v1-32k, kimi-k2.6, or kimi-k2.5.

preferences.title: OpenAI API Key
preferences.name: openAIAPIKey
preferences.description: Your OpenAI API key.

preferences.title: OpenAI Base URL
preferences.name: openAIBaseURL
preferences.description: OpenAI API base URL.

preferences.title: OpenAI Model
preferences.name: openAIModel
preferences.description: OpenAI model name. Latency-tuned defaults are gpt-4.1-mini/gpt-4.1. GPT-5.x reasoning models (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.4-nano) are sent with reasoning_effort=minimal for translation latency.

preferences.title: OpenAI OCR Model
preferences.name: openAIOcrModel
preferences.description: Vision-capable OpenAI model used when OCR Engine is OpenAI Vision. Leave blank to reuse the OpenAI Model above.
